response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_registration_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_code
ATTR belt_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_code
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY SeatAssignment
PK flight_code, passenger_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_code, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_time : time : PK
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status_label : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration_code
REL BaggageBelt -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_code
REL SeatAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL SeatAssignment -> Passenger : 1..N -> 1 : FK=passenger_code
REL FlightStatus -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
